item.name: Wind-up Haurchefant
item.description:
What isn't dead (or is recreated in a goldsmith's workshop) can never die.

Use item to acquire the wind-up Haurchefant minion.
item.tooltip:
Lord Haurchefant is, from all
indications, quite fond of you.
   - Discomposed Cataloger
item.specialactiondescription:
Increases action party DEF by 40.
Duration: 10s

obj.n: As Goes Light, So Goes Darkness
